error_signature: Outlook Email Trigger stuck fetching same old email
title: Outlook Email Trigger fetching old emails repeatedly
symptom: The Microsoft Outlook Email Trigger keeps fetching the same old email, ignoring new messages. Despite attempts to reset and reconfigure, the issue persists.
applies_when: Trigger is configured to fetch new emails
not_this_if: The trigger is fetching new emails correctly
root_cause: The issue arises from the internal delta sync token being cached, which prevents the trigger from recognizing new emails. This can happen if the trigger's configuration does not properly account for changes in the email state.
fix_steps: Open the Outlook Email Trigger node settings
Add filters for Folders to Include, Read Status, and Sender
Implement an action to move the message from one folder to another
Save the workflow and test it again
agent_instruction: Add filters to the Outlook Email Trigger and implement a message moving action.
